## Checklist

- [ ] `.venv/bin/pytest` passes.
- [ ] New behavior has a test where reasonably testable.
- [ ] UI strings go through `i18n.t(...)` and exist in both `EN` and `KO`.
- [ ] CSS tokens stay centralized in `popup.py`'s `_CSS` block.
- [ ] Change keeps the app small and focused (no scope creep into non-goals).
